title: phaseolus coccineus var. griseus
intro: Phaseolus coccineus var. griseus is a variant of the scarlet runner bean plant, which is a type of climbing legume native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Phaseolus coccineus var. griseus are numerous, including its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, coughs, and respiratory issues.
